title: `podman system service` and `podman system connection` is not on docs.podman.io
body:
The man page for `podman system service` seems to be missing from docs.podman.io.  This [page](http://docs.podman.io/en/latest/system.html) has a number of commands for `podman system`, but service is not one of them.

`podman system connection` is also not on this page and should be.

comments.body: Seems this issue has been fixed. Should it still be opened?

@zhangguanzhang: Closing this issue.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7252#issuecomment-674426291):

>/close


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
